title: Motion Path behavior (factoryID=24) shape-following, retime-aware (subsystem 3)
goal: CONFIRMED DECODE (T-qslidein001): Slide_In has 8 Motion Path behaviors (factoryID=24) that drive the rounded-rect mask/panel slide. Engine has NO Motion Path implementation -> the panel does not move. Observed FCP truth (salvage note, headless): panel is a TOP band y[0..~250], RIGHT-pinned, rigid LEFTWARD slide, left edge 806->655->506->356->206->56->0 over f0..6 (~-134 px/frame, ~-806 total), then STOPS (retime playhead). Params: End Point X=400 Y=0; Start (0,0); Position(id200) X curve 0->4080 (ARC-LENGTH param); Position(id206) CLOSED DIAMOND shape curve X:0->405->810->405 Y:0->405->0->-405; Attach To Shape=1, Shape Source=0, Direction=1, Loops=1. Whole layer is RETIMED (Transition B Retime 1->31 nonlinear/eased) so motion completes early. A naive linear Start->End tween is INSUFFICIENT (salvage tried it: got tx=-2510 vs target ~+1531->-726). Build: shape-path-follower = sample the id206 closed path by the id200 arc-length param, retime-aware. Must fire on >=2 built-ins for no-hardcode. Depends on subsystem 1+2 landing first (the panel must render before its motion matters). Gate net-positive vs GUI GT.
